screener_meta.stage2_avg_vol_basis: 30-day average daily volume from get_equity_fundamentals (used as ADV; threshold >5,000,000 shares)
screener_meta.note: INIO matched mktcap+ADV but was EXCLUDED: only 14 real daily bars (recent listing) -> cannot compute 14-day ATR / 20-day EMA precisely. STX/TER failed 30-day ADV>5M. Scan returned 200/261 rows (61 untruncated, mostly small-caps); see SCAN_TRUNCATION alert.

alerts.detail: STILL OPEN (reaffirmed this market-hours run). Account holds two positions this bot opened on 2026-06-24 but that were NEVER persisted to state.positions (06-24 market-hours runs placed live orders then failed to commit state -- see GIT_PUSH_AUTH root cause). CURRENT (06-25 ~09:41 ET): COMP 2sh (avg 10.67), live ~10.83, with agentic resting GTC stop-limit sell stop 10.30 / limit 10.14 (order 6a3bf3cf...), state=confirmed; NO take-profit (+6%) leg ever placed. AAL 2sh (avg 17.26), live ~17.69, with agentic resting GTC stop-limit sell stop 16.66 / limit 16.40 (order 6a3c01c6...), state=confirmed; NO take-profit (+6%) leg ever placed. Per Ground Rules the bot only manages positions opened AND recorded in state.positions; these are NOT recorded and faithfully adopting them would require GUESSING the missing entry metadata (phase, peak_price, the missing TP legs) which the prompt forbids -> LEFT COMP/AAL AND their resting stops COMPLETELY UNTOUCHED again this run (no stops added, no TP added, no liquidation, not adopted). OPERATOR DECISION STILL NEEDED: (a) manually add COMP/AAL to state.positions (with chosen entry price/phase) if you want the bot to manage/exit them -- note brackets are stop-loss-only, no take-profit; or (b) keep managing them yourself. Root cause to fix: container persistence/push reliability so market-hours runs cannot place live orders without recording them.

Structural condition: per-position budget = 6% x total account equity ($309.51) = $18.57, and the rules require a MINIMUM of 2 whole shares per entry. 23 of 24 screener survivors are too expensive to buy 2 shares within $18.57 (cheapest 2-share lots: BB ~$20.7, QXO ~$35, RKT ~$30, all others far higher) -> max affordable whole shares = 0 or 1 < 2 -> any signal on them is non-actionable and skipped per the 'minimum 2 shares' guardrail. The ONLY survivor affordable at 2 shares is FRMI (ask ~$8.31 -> 2sh=$16.62), but FRMI fired NO entry signal this run (momentum: 8.29<prior-day high 9.08; dip: 18.2% below 5-day intraday high 10.13, outside 3.5-5.0% band). Net: 0 entries possible this run on sizing grounds even before volume-leg confirmation. Operator should note the account size makes most large-cap movers untradeable under the 6%/2-share rule.

run_scan('Top Most Active Movers') reported total_items=261 but returned only 200 instrument rows; the remaining 61 were not retrievable via the tool. The top of the returned set is dominated by small-caps; 52 of the 200 had mktcap>5B and were fully Stage-2 screened. Some of the 61 untruncated rows could in principle have been large-cap survivors but were not available to screen. Did NOT call get_scans/create_scan (per Step 5 rules). Documented for transparency.

RECURRING infra issue: containers may start with a STALE/empty checkout and the default remote URL has no usable push credential. THIS RUN: container started at a STALE local HEAD (a4c66d5 = 06-24 09:01 state) that was BEHIND authoritative origin/main (d8dd497 = 06-25 09:23 state, which contained the 06-24 persistence-failure discovery). Recovered by fetching origin/main with proxy bypass and hard-resetting onto it BEFORE acting, so this run built on the correct authoritative state. Push via: git -c http.proxy= push https://x-access-token:$GITHUB_TOKEN@github.com/polishbandit/trading-routine.git (the url.insteadOf local_proxy rewrite returns 403; bare oauth2:@ URL is rejected). Operator should fix persistent remote credential + guarantee containers clone current main.

notes: 2026-06-22 17:54 ET (first invocation ever): state initialized; outside-hours; $306.13 all cash, 0 positions.

2026-06-23: screener BLOCKED early (scan/agreement) then RESOLVED 10:30 ET (SCAN_ID aa5ac5af-...). First usable Step6 (10:30) was the one-time DRY RUN; no signal; live_trading_enabled set TRUE. No entries all day; account stayed $306.13 all cash.
2026-06-24 09:01 ET: outside-hours pre-market; LAST cleanly-persisted run before the 06-24 market-hours persistence failure.

2026-06-24 (MARKET HOURS) -- INFERRED FROM ORDER HISTORY, NEVER PERSISTED: bot traded live (UMC, RKT both later closed by user sells; opened COMP 2sh @10.67 and AAL 2sh @17.26 each with a -3.5%/-5.0% stop-loss, no +6% TP) but state was never committed. Core open problem (see UNTRACKED_BOT_POSITIONS_PERSISTENCE_FAILURE).

2026-06-25 09:23 ET: outside-hours pre-market run that DISCOVERED the 06-24 persistence failure, reconstructed COMP/AAL from order history, left them untouched, raised the HIGH alert, and (correctly) kept date at 2026-06-23 so the first market-hours run would do the new-day reset. Authoritative state (origin/main d8dd497) this 09:43 run built on.

2026-06-25 09:43 ET: FIRST MARKET-HOURS run of the new trading day (Thu, regular session, ~09:34-09:43 ET; UTC ~13:43). GIT: local checkout was STALE (HEAD a4c66d5, behind origin/main d8dd497); fetched + hard-reset onto authoritative origin/main before acting (see GIT_PUSH_AUTH). STEP 1 new-day reset: date 2026-06-23 -> 2026-06-25; equity_open_today set to current total account equity $309.51 (broker total incl. untracked COMP/AAL, per Operator Decision 1) as circuit-breaker baseline; halted_date stays null; screener cleared then rebuilt. Reconcile: state.positions empty (no tracked positions); live untracked COMP 2sh + AAL 2sh left untouched (see HIGH alert). STEP 2 circuit breaker: $309.51 vs open $309.51 = 0.00% -> NOT fired. STEP 3 volatility halt: no tracked positions -> nothing. STEP 4 exits: no tracked positions -> no TP/SL/trailing work. STEP 5 screener REBUILT: run_scan(aa5ac5af-...) 'Top Most Active Movers' 261 items/200 returned -> Stage2 (mktcap>5B from scan: 52; then ADV>5M via fundamentals 30-day avg, ATR14>2.5% via daily historicals) -> 24 survivors; INIO excluded (insufficient history); all 24 fractional-eligible (Stage3). STEP 6 entries (LIVE; dry-run gate already consumed 06-23): NO entry taken. Sizing: 6% x $309.51 = $18.57/position, min 2 shares -> only FRMI affordable at 2sh ($16.62) but FRMI fired no signal (momentum 8.29<prior-day high 9.08; dip 18.2% below 5d intraday high 10.13). All other survivors' momentum price-legs that passed are non-actionable (cannot meet 2-share minimum) -> ENTRY_SIZING_BLOCKED alert. Settled cash (buying_power $237.45) ample but moot. NO orders placed/cancelled. Circuit breaker NOT fired; no volatility halt fired. Margin acct 493596811 (agentic_allowed=false) untouched.
